hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "/data/codes/mica" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph status --repo "/data/codes/mica" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
